excerpt: Rising Treasury yields and hawkish Federal Reserve signals are increasing Bitcoin's crash risk as investors move to safer assets. This shift is driven by the appeal of higher interest rates.

content.introduction: Rising Treasury yields and hawkish Federal Reserve signals are increasing Bitcoin's crash risk as investors move to safer assets. This shift is driven by the appeal of higher interest rates.
body: Rising U.S. Treasury yields and hawkish Federal Reserve signals are pressuring Bitcoin as investors pivot toward safer, interest-bearing assets.
